editor_note: Cursor bet that the future of coding is not copilot-inside-VSCode but a ground-up rethinking of the editor. They were right. Tab completion that reads your mind, inline diffs that make sense, and a cmd-K that actually works. The VSCode fork approach was the right call: familiar enough to switch, different enough to stay.
investors: Andreessen Horowitz, Thrive Capital, OpenAI Startup Fund
